hero.title: Support the worship and charitable mission of St Nick's
hero.lede: Parish giving now has a clear local destination, alongside the charitable work and practical support the parish already makes visible.

intro.title: Parish giving and outreach support together
intro.body: Use the parish giving link for St Nicholas itself, then follow the supporting links for parish-connected outreach and practical care.
intro.asideBody: The live parish website currently uses MyDona for direct parish giving.

cards.title: Donate to St Nicholas Parish
paragraphs: This is the parish's own giving route and should be the first option for supporting worship, ministry, and the day-to-day life of St Nick's.
cards.note: The donation page opens securely in a new tab.

cards.title: Support parish-linked ministries
paragraphs: St Nicholas Bread and the Borderlands partnership are both part of the parish's public witness of charity and practical solidarity.
items: St Nicholas Bread offers food and practical help locally.
Borderlands accompanies refugees, asylum seekers, and people facing exclusion.

cards.title: Prefer practical or pastoral support
paragraphs: People often support the parish by volunteering, responding to appeals in the weekly notices, or speaking directly with the parish office.

cards.title: Need help before you give?
paragraphs: If you are unsure which giving route is right, contact the parish office and the parish can direct you appropriately.
